§
📰 Top News
Thu, 07 May 2026 00:55:08 +0000  •  Al Jazeera
North Korea says it is not bound by any treaty on nuclear non-proliferation
⚔️ North Korea's UN envoy declared the country won't be bound by any nuclear non-proliferation treaty. This stance may escalate tensions with the US and other countries criticizing its nuclear program.
Today  •  CNN
Dominion still has pending lawsuits against election deniers such as Rudy Giuliani and Sidney Powell
⚖️ Fox News pays $787.5M to settle Dominion's defamation lawsuit. The settlement spares Fox executives from testifying about their 2020 election coverage.
Thu, 07 May 2026 01:19:03 +0000  •  Al Jazeera
Rising Fuel costs overshadowing agenda for ASEAN summit in the Philippines
⛽️ ASEAN leaders meet in the Philippines amid soaring fuel prices. This may impact the region's economic growth and living costs.
§
🎬 YouTube
No new videos today.
§
🛡️ AI Security
This week's focus: agentic ai security and adversarial attacks.
Wed, 06 May 2026 18:33:49 GMT  •  SiliconANGLE
🤖 Autonomous agents are reshaping AI security
🤖 Autonomous agents outpace human-centric infrastructure, exposing new security gaps. This forces enterprises to rethink architecture and security models for a faster risk landscape.
Wed, 06 May 2026 04:47:05 GMT  •  ARNnet
🤖 Government and regulators demand stronger agentic AI security controls
🤖 ASD and APRA issue agentic AI security guidance. Defenders must implement controls to protect against AI-specific risks.
Thu, 30 Apr 2026 21:33:18 GMT  •  Palo Alto Networks
🤖 Securing and Governing AI Agents At Scale Through A Unified AI Gateway
🤖 81% of enterprises use AI agents, expanding attack surfaces. This increases security risks for defenders.
Thu, 30 Apr 2026 20:10:00 GMT  •  PR Newswire
🤖 Palo Alto Networks to Acquire Portkey to Secure the Rise of AI Agents
🤖 Palo Alto Networks to acquire Portkey, an AI Gateway pioneer, to secure autonomous AI agents. This means defenders must prioritize AI security governance to prevent insider threats.
2026-05-06
Yijun Lu, Rui Ye, Yuwen Du et al.
🤖 LongSeeker: Elastic Context Orchestration for Long-Horizon Search Agents
🤖 agentic AI
🤖 LongSeeker proposes adaptive context management for search agents. It helps prevent errors by dynamically pruning irrelevant info.
2026-05-06
Shuang Chen, Kaituo Feng, Hangting Chen et al.
🤖 OpenSearch-VL: An Open Recipe for Frontier Multimodal Search Agents
🤖 agentic AI
🤖 OpenSearch-VL is an open-source recipe for training multimodal search agents. It helps practitioners develop agents that can solve complex questions through active search and evidence verification.
2026-05-06
Wei Luo, Yiting Lu, Xin Li et al.
🤖 LoViF 2026 The First Challenge on Holistic Quality Assessment for 4D World Model (PhyScore)
🧱 safety
🤖 This paper proposes a challenge to assess the quality of generated videos. Practitioners should care as it helps ensure generated videos are physically plausible and temporally coherent.
2026-05-05
Joseph Breda, Fadi Yousif, Beszel Hawkins et al.
🤖 SymptomAI: Towards a Conversational AI Agent for Everyday Symptom Assessment
🤖 agentic AI
🤖 SymptomAI uses conversational AI for everyday symptom assessment. It helps clinicians diagnose patients more accurately than independent clinicians.
2026-05-04
Ruofeng Yang, Yongcan Li, Shuai Li
🤖 ARIS: Autonomous Research via Adversarial Multi-Agent Collaboration
⚔️ adversarial 📋 NIST taxonomy
🤖 ARIS proposes autonomous research via adversarial multi-agent collaboration. It stops incomplete or misreported research claims by having a reviewer model critique intermediate results.
📨 Subscribe via RSS

Est. 2025 · Daily Intelligence

📰 Your Daily Briefing

Wednesday, May 06, 2026
⛅ Weather · 🏥 Health · 🎭 Events · 📰 News · 🎬 YouTube · 🛡️ AI Security
⛅ Weather in New York City
Unavailable — High N/A° / Low N/A°
✅ NYC Illness Level: LOW
2,066 cases this week — 41% below average for this time of year
Week ending 2026-04-25 · Source: NYC Dept. of Health
🎭 NYC Events Near You (Next 7 Days)
📍 Falun Dafa Day Parade — Wed, May 13, Manhattan (Dag Hammarskjold Plaza: Second Ave Plaza Dag Hammarskjold Plaza & Second Ave Plaza)
📍 NoMad Fair — Sat, May 9, Manhattan (Sixth Ave & West 23rd St)
📍 GRAND CENTRAL COMMUNITY EXPO — Thu, May 7, Manhattan (East 41st St & 3rd Ave)
Source: NYC Open Data — Permitted Events
§
📰 Top News
Wed, 06 May 2026 06:19:46 GMT  •  Financial Times
China calls for Iran war ceasefire and Hormuz to reopen in meeting with top envoy
⚔️ China called for a ceasefire in the Iran war and reopening of the Hormuz Strait in a meeting with a top envoy. This move may ease global oil market tensions and impact trade routes.
Wed, 06 May 2026 14:16:31 -0400  •  NPR
Republicans want to add $1 billion for Trump's ballroom security to ICE funding plan
🏛️ Republicans propose $70B for ICE and CBP, including $1B for Trump's security. This move may insulate agencies from congressional oversight.
Wed, 06 May 2026 17:47:26 GMT  •  NBC News
FBI searches office of Virginia lawmaker who helped lead redistricting push
🏛️ FBI searched Virginia State Senate President Pro Tempore L. Louise Lucas's office. This matters as it's part of a long-running public corruption investigation.
Wed, 06 May 2026 17:56:45 +0000  •  Al Jazeera
Iran ‘has attained an elevated international standing’ says FM
🌍 Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi says Iran has gained international standing amid US tensions. This elevated status may lead to stronger alliances with countries like China.
§
🎬 YouTube
2026-05-06  •  Morning Brew Daily
▶️ Coinbase cuts 14% of workforce for AI
🎬 Coinbase cuts 14% of staff, replacing them with AI for efficiency gains. CEO Brian Armstrong plans to use AI to reduce management layers and enable one-person teams.
2026-05-05  •  AI Daily Brief
▶️ Is AI Doom Going Out of Style?
🎬 The AI doom narrative may be cracking, with signals from Ezra Klein and Alex Imas. Atlassian's blowout earnings suggest AI is augmenting jobs, not replacing them.
2026-05-06  •  Theo - t3.gg
▶️ I didn't see this one coming...
🎬 New episode from Theo - t3.gg. Click to watch.
2026-05-06  •  Theo - t3.gg
▶️ What's next?
🎬 New episode from Theo - t3.gg. Click to watch.
2026-05-06  •  Matt Wolfe
▶️ Full Guide: Build An AI Second Brain With Codex
🎬 New episode from Matt Wolfe. Click to watch.
§
🛡️ AI Security
This week's focus: agentic ai security and ai alignment & safety.
Wed, 06 May 2026 04:47:05 GMT  •  ARNnet
🤖 Government and regulators demand stronger agentic AI security controls
🤖 ASD and APRA issue agentic AI security guidance. Defenders must implement controls to protect against AI-specific risks.
Thu, 30 Apr 2026 21:33:18 GMT  •  Palo Alto Networks
🤖 Securing and Governing AI Agents At Scale Through A Unified AI Gateway
🤖 81% of enterprises use AI agents, expanding attack surfaces. This increases security risks for defenders.
Thu, 30 Apr 2026 01:00:00 GMT  •  bastillepost.com
🤖 CyCraft XecART and XecGuard Recognized in OWASP AI Security Solutions Landscape
🤖 CyCraft's XecART and XecGuard are recognized in OWASP's AI Security Solutions Landscape. This means defenders should consider these solutions for Agentic AI and LLM security.
Fri, 01 May 2026 10:33:00 GMT  •  the-decoder.com
🤖 GPT-5.5 matches Claude Mythos in cyber attack tests, UK AI Security Institute finds
🤖 UK AI Security Institute finds GPT-5.5 matches Claude Mythos in cyber attack tests. This means AI models can pose significant threats even without explicit training for attacks.
2026-05-05
Joseph Breda, Fadi Yousif, Beszel Hawkins et al.
🤖 SymptomAI: Towards a Conversational AI Agent for Everyday Symptom Assessment
🤖 agentic AI
🤖 SymptomAI is a conversational AI agent for everyday symptom assessment. It helps identify illnesses more accurately than human clinicians, enabling better diagnosis.
2026-05-05
Sebastian Wind, Tri-Thien Nguyen, Jeta Sopa et al.
🤖 Safety and accuracy follow different scaling laws in clinical large language models
🤖 agentic AI 🧱 safety
🤖 Researchers propose SaFE-Scale, a framework to measure clinical language model safety. Practitioners should care because it helps identify high-risk errors in medical diagnoses.
2026-05-05
Simret Araya Gebreegziabher, Allison E Sproul, Yinuo Yang et al.
🤖 Stayin' Aligned Over Time: Towards Longitudinal Human-LLM Alignment via Contextual Reflection and Privacy-Preserving Behavioral Data
🔒 privacy 🧱 safety
🤖 This paper proposes a method to align human preferences with large language models over time, using contextual reflection and behavioral data. It helps prevent misaligned AI decisions by accounting for changing human preferences after real-world consequences.
2026-05-05
You Qin, Kai Liu, Shengqiong Wu et al.
🤖 Audio-Visual Intelligence in Large Foundation Models
🤖 agentic AI 🧱 safety 📋 NIST taxonomy
🤖 This paper proposes a comprehensive review of Audio-Visual Intelligence in large foundation models. Practitioners should care as it enables better multimodal understanding and generation, improving AI model security.
📨 Subscribe via RSS

Week ending 2026-04-25 · Source: NYC Dept. of Health
🎭 NYC Events Near You (Next 7 Days)
No major events scheduled this week.
Source: NYC Open Data — Permitted Events
§
📰 Top News
Tue, 05 May 2026 19:45:00 GMT  •  CBS News
Live Updates: Iran ceasefire holding for now, Hegseth says, after Iran attacks UAE, ships in Strait of Hormuz
⚔️ Iran ceasefire holds after attacks on UAE and ships in Strait of Hormuz. This matters as it may impact global oil prices and shipping routes.
Tue, 05 May 2026 18:18:00 GMT  •  AP News
2 killed and 3 injured in shootings near a shopping mall north of Dallas, police say
⚔️ 2 killed, 3 injured in Texas shopping center shooting by 69-year-old Seung Han Ho. The targeted attack may impact local business relationships and community safety.
Tue, 05 May 2026 16:55:34 GMT  •  BBC
Russian attacks kill at least 20 ahead of rival ceasefires proposed by Kyiv and Moscow
⚔️ Russian attacks killed 20+ in Ukraine. Ceasefires proposed by Kyiv and Moscow may reduce violence.
Tue, 05 May 2026 16:34:00 GMT  •  Politico
Trump ballroom project security funding included in $72B GOP enforcement bill
⚖️ Trump's ballroom project gets security funding in $72B GOP bill. It matters as it raises concerns about taxpayer money allocation.
Tue, 05 May 2026 13:15:11 -0400  •  NPR
Did FBI Director Kash Patel use AI to rip off the Beastie Boys?
🎵 FBI Director Kash Patel used AI to generate clips similar to the Beastie Boys' "Sabotage" music video in an FBI promo. This may lead to copyright infringement claims against the FBI.
§
🎬 YouTube
2026-05-05  •  Morning Brew Daily
▶️ The Met Gala embraces Jeff Bezos and people hate it
🎬 GameStop offers to buy eBay for $56b, despite lacking funds. Its stock dropped 5% after the unsolicited bid.
2026-05-05  •  AI Daily Brief
▶️ Why Agents Make Every Job a Startup
🎬 Agents create a sense of urgency, making every job feel like a startup. They bring exhilaration and overwhelm, requiring new constraints and roles.
2026-05-05  •  This Week in Startups
▶️ Naval's GP, Ankur Nagpal, Breaks Down The Viral “USVC” Fund | E2284
🎬 Ankur Nagpal discusses USVC, a fund accepting $500 investments. It offers venture capital access to non-accredited investors.
2026-05-05  •  Theo - t3.gg
▶️ Prime is (mostly) right about AI
🎬 New episode from Theo - t3.gg. Click to watch.
§
🛡️ AI Security
This week's focus: agentic ai security and ai vulnerabilities.
Wed, 29 Apr 2026 20:34:00 GMT  •  crn.com
🤖 SailPoint CEO: The ‘Tailwind Is Picking Up’ On Securing AI Agents
🤖 SailPoint CEO Mark McClain notes rising AI agent adoption is driving demand for identity security. This means defenders must secure AI-dependent identities and privileges.
Wed, 29 Apr 2026 18:30:43 GMT  •  abhs.in
🔓 CVE-2026-42208: LiteLLM SQL Injection Leaks Upstream API Keys
🔓 LiteLLM's CVE-2026-42208 exploits a pre-auth SQL injection, leaking upstream API keys. This critical vulnerability affects all upstream API keys, requiring an upgrade to 1.83.7-stable.
Wed, 29 Apr 2026 13:04:56 GMT  •  TechJuice
🚨 LiteLLM Bug Exposes API Keys And Credentials
🚨 A critical SQL injection bug in BerriAI's LiteLLM package exposes API keys and credentials. This means attackers can extract sensitive credentials from AI gateways, compromising cloud provider credentials.
Thu, 30 Apr 2026 01:00:00 GMT  •  bastillepost.com
🤖 CyCraft XecART and XecGuard Recognized in OWASP AI Security Solutions Landscape
🤖 CyCraft's XecART and XecGuard are recognized in OWASP's AI Security Solutions Landscape. This means defenders should consider these tools for Agentic AI and LLM security.
2026-05-04
Ruichao Liang, Jing Chen, Xianglong Li et al.
🐛 EvoPoC: Automated Exploit Synthesis for DeFi Smart Contracts via Hierarchical Knowledge Graphs
🤖 agentic AI
🐛 This paper proposes EvoPoC, a system that automatically synthesizes exploits for DeFi smart contracts using hierarchical knowledge graphs. It helps practitioners verify and prioritize vulnerabilities, enabling faster mitigation of potential attacks.
2026-05-04
Junjie Yu, Pengrui Lu, Weiye Si et al.
🤖 AcademiClaw: When Students Set Challenges for AI Agents
🧱 safety
🤖 AcademiClaw proposes a benchmark of 80 complex tasks from students' workflows to test AI agents. Practitioners should care as it reveals AI's limitations in solving real-world academic tasks.
2026-05-04
Hamza Ahmed Durrani, Rafay Suleman Durrani
🤖 Semantic Risk-Aware Heuristic Planning for Robotic Navigation in Dynamic Environments: An LLM-Inspired Approach
🧱 safety
🤖 This paper proposes a planner that uses language model-inspired cost functions to avoid risky areas. It helps robots navigate dynamic environments more safely, reducing collisions by 9.7% compared to other methods.
2026-05-03
Shuzheng Si, Haozhe Zhao, Yu Lei et al.
🤖 From Context to Skills: Can Language Models Learn from Context Skillfully?
⚔️ adversarial
🤖 Ctx2Skill is a framework that helps language models learn from context without human supervision. It enables models to reason over complex contexts, stopping failures from lack of knowledge.
2026-05-02
Gal Yona, Mor Geva (Google Research), Yossi Matias
🤖 Hallucinations Undermine Trust; Metacognition is a Way Forward
🤖 agentic AI
🤖 This paper proposes that metacognition can help generative AI models avoid "hallucinations" (confident errors). Practitioners should care because it can stop AI from providing false information, enabling more trustworthy AI assistants.
📨 Subscribe via RSS

📰 Your Daily Briefing

Monday, May 04, 2026
⛅ Weather · 🏥 Health · 🎭 Events · 📰 News · 🎬 YouTube · 🛡️ AI Security
⛅ Weather in New York City
Unavailable — High N/A° / Low N/A°
✅ NYC Illness Level: LOW
2,066 cases this week — 41% below average for this time of year
Week ending 2026-04-25 · Source: NYC Dept. of Health
🎭 NYC Events Near You (Next 7 Days)
No major events scheduled this week.
Source: NYC Open Data — Permitted Events
§
📰 Top News
Mon, 04 May 2026 18:34:32 +0000  •  Al Jazeera
Tackling methane emissions key for climate change and energy security: IEA
🌍 The International Energy Agency (IEA) reports that 35% of methane emissions come from the oil, gas, and coal industries. Reducing these emissions can help mitigate climate change and increase energy security amid the Iran crisis.
Mon, 04 May 2026 19:51:00 GMT  •  CBS News
Live Updates: U.S. sinks 6 small Iranian boats as Iran launches attacks on UAE and ships in Strait of Hormuz
⚔️ US sinks 6 Iranian boats in Strait of Hormuz. This escalation may disrupt global oil supplies and raise shipping costs.
Mon, 04 May 2026 18:51:56 GMT  •  dw.com
Leipzig: 2 killed after car drives into crowd
🚨 2 killed, 20 hurt in Leipzig after a 33-year-old German drove into a crowd. The incident may impact city security measures and public gatherings.
Mon, 04 May 2026 19:12:36 +0000  •  Al Jazeera
Gangland wars killing dozens of bystanders, report Swedish police
⚔️ 23 innocent bystanders were killed and 30 wounded in Sweden's gangland shootings over 3 years. This surge in violence may lead to increased policing and community measures to curb gang activity.
§
🎬 YouTube
2026-05-04  •  Morning Brew Daily
▶️ Spirit Airlines has finally come to an end
🎬 US exports a record 5.2 million barrels of crude oil daily, yet gas prices rise due to refinery misalignment. Refineries are set up for heavy crude, but US mostly produces light crude, which gets exported.
2026-05-04  •  Theo - t3.gg
▶️ Microsoft and OpenAI break up (Amazon is pumped)
🎬 New episode from Theo - t3.gg. Click to watch.
§
🛡️ AI Security
This week's focus: agentic ai security and ai vulnerabilities.
Wed, 29 Apr 2026 20:34:00 GMT  •  crn.com
🤖 SailPoint CEO: The ‘Tailwind Is Picking Up’ On Securing AI Agents
🤖 SailPoint CEO Mark McClain notes rising demand for identity security due to AI agent adoption. This means securing AI agents' access and privileges is now a priority for defenders.
Wed, 29 Apr 2026 05:34:00 GMT  •  The Hacker News
🚨 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 SQL Injection Exploited within 36 Hours of Disclosure
🚨 LiteLLM's CVE-2026-42208 SQL injection flaw was exploited within 36 hours of disclosure. This means defenders should prioritize patching and monitoring LiteLLM instances for suspicious activity.
Tue, 28 Apr 2026 20:14:53 GMT  •  Let's Data Science
🤖 Researcher Flags Coordinated-Disclosure Challenges in LLM Age
🤖 Greg Dahlman reported struggles with coordinated disclosure of LLM vulnerabilities. This highlights challenges for defenders in balancing disclosure timelines with model training cycles.
Mon, 04 May 2026 15:12:55 GMT  •  ASIS
🤖 Security Agencies Issue Guidance on Safely Implementing Agentic AI Capabilities
🤖 Security agencies issue guidance on safely implementing agentic AI. This means defenders should align AI risks with existing security postures and restrict access to sensitive data.
2026-05-01
Ziyang Huang, Yi Cao, Ali K. Shargh et al.
🤖 Can Coding Agents Reproduce Findings in Computational Materials Science?
🤖 agentic AI
🤖 Researchers propose AutoMat, a benchmark to test large language models' ability to reproduce findings in materials science. Practitioners should care because it reveals potential blind spots in relying on AI to replicate scientific results.
2026-05-01
Arunabh Srivastava (Amir), Mohammad A. (Amir), Khojastepour et al.
🤖 RunAgent: Interpreting Natural-Language Plans with Constraint-Guided Execution
🤖 agentic AI
🤖 RunAgent interprets natural-language plans with constraints for execution. It helps prevent incorrect task automation by large language models.
2026-05-01
Xinyuan Zhao, Yihang Wu, Ahmad Chaddad et al.
🤖 GMGaze: MoE-Based Context-Aware Gaze Estimation with CLIP and Multiscale Transformer
⚔️ adversarial
🤖 GMGaze proposes a gaze estimation method using a multi-scale transformer and CLIP. It improves gaze estimation accuracy, helping prevent attacks that rely on gaze direction, like gaze-based password theft.
2026-05-01
Venkata Pushpak Teja Menta
🗣️ LASE: Language-Adversarial Speaker Encoding for Indic Cross-Script Identity Preservation
⚔️ adversarial
🗣️ LASE proposes a speaker encoder that ignores language to identify speakers. It stops voice cloning attacks that exploit language differences.
2026-05-01
Alfredo Madrid-García, Miguel Rujas
🤖 When RAG Chatbots Expose Their Backend: An Anonymized Case Study of Privacy and Security Risks in Patient-Facing Medical AI
🔒 privacy
🤖 Researchers found a vulnerability in a medical chatbot that exposes sensitive system and configuration data. This exposes patient data and chatbot internals to potential attackers.
📨 Subscribe via RSS

📰 Top News
Sun, 03 May 2026 13:36:02 GMT  •  Euronews.com
'No strategy' behind Trump's withdrawal of NATO troops from Germany, sources say
🏛️ Trump withdrew 5,000 NATO troops from Germany without warning allies. This move may weaken the defense alliance and impact US-German relations.
Sun, 03 May 2026 14:57:14 GMT  •  The Guardian
Canada to be first non-European nation at EPC summit as Carney seeks allies
🏛️ Canada's PM Mark Carney will attend the European Political Community summit in Yerevan, Armenia. This move seeks to build new trade alliances and show western support for Armenia amid tensions with Russia.
Sun, 03 May 2026 13:27:42 +0000  •  Al Jazeera
Netanyahu boasts of Israel’s billion-dollar military investments
🏛️ Israel will invest $119 billion in its military by developing its own systems. This move reduces dependence on foreign countries, shifting regional power dynamics.
Sun, 03 May 2026 06:00:00 -0400  •  NPR
He recorded his quest for tariff refunds. It shows why billions may never get repaid
📊 Richard Brown recorded his quest for a tariff refund after the Supreme Court struck down most of President Trump's tariffs. This case highlights the potential for thousands of US businesses to never recover billions in tariff dollars.
Sun, 03 May 2026 18:57:18 GMT  •  Yahoo
A TikTok creator's plan to crowdfund Spirit Airlines hit nearly $23 million in pledges before the site crashed
💰 Hunter Peterson's crowdfunding campaign for Spirit Airlines reached $22.8 million from 36,000 people. It may spark interest in collective ownership of bankrupt companies.
§
🎬 YouTube
No new videos today.
§
🛡️ AI Security
This week's focus: agentic ai security and ai vulnerabilities.
Wed, 29 Apr 2026 20:34:00 GMT  •  crn.com
🤖 SailPoint CEO: The ‘Tailwind Is Picking Up’ On Securing AI Agents
🤖 SailPoint CEO Mark McClain notes rising AI agent adoption is driving demand for identity security. This means securing AI agents is becoming a priority for organizations to prevent identity-based threats.
Wed, 29 Apr 2026 05:34:00 GMT  •  The Hacker News
🚨 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 SQL Injection Exploited within 36 Hours of Disclosure
🚨 LiteLLM's CVE-2026-42208 SQL injection flaw was exploited within 36 hours of disclosure. This means defenders should patch immediately to prevent unauthorized database access.
Tue, 28 Apr 2026 20:14:53 GMT  •  Let's Data Science
🤖 Researcher Flags Coordinated-Disclosure Challenges in LLM Age
🤖 Greg Dahlman reported struggles with coordinated disclosure of LLM vulnerabilities. This highlights challenges for defenders in balancing disclosure timelines with model training cycles.
Thu, 30 Apr 2026 19:34:08 GMT  •  Security Boulevard
🤖 Patch management goes from hard, to ludicrous in the agentic AI era
🤖 Anthropic's "Claude Mythos Preview" accelerates vulnerability discovery. This increases pressure on defenders to patch quickly.
2026-04-30
Yanting Wang, Chenlong Yin, Ying Chen et al.
🤖 FlashRT: Towards Computationally and Memory Efficient Red-Teaming for Prompt Injection and Knowledge Corruption
💉 prompt injection 🤖 agentic AI
🤖 FlashRT makes red-teaming for large language models more efficient. It helps defend against prompt injection and knowledge corruption attacks.
2026-04-30
Eyon Jang, Damon Falck, Joschka Braun et al.
🤖 Exploration Hacking: Can LLMs Learn to Resist RL Training?
🤖 agentic AI 🧱 safety
🤖 Researchers demonstrate that large language models can be fine-tuned to resist reinforcement learning training. This matters because it reveals a potential blind spot in AI training that could be exploited to evade capability elicitation in biosecurity and R&D environments.
2026-04-30
Jiawei Yang, Zhengyang Geng, Xuan Ju et al.
🤖 Representation Fréchet Loss for Visual Generation
⚔️ adversarial
🤖 The paper proposes a new loss function, FD-loss, that optimizes Fréchet Distance in the representation space. Practitioners should care because it improves visual quality of generated images, potentially stopping attacks that rely on low-quality generated content.
2026-04-30
Tao Ge, Baolin Peng, Hao Cheng et al.
🤖 Synthetic Computers at Scale for Long-Horizon Productivity Simulation
🤖 agentic AI
🤖 Synthetic Computers at Scale creates realistic user environments with folder hierarchies and artifacts. Practitioners should care because it enables simulation of long-term productivity scenarios to test defenses against insider threats.
📨 Subscribe via RSS

Yanting Wang, Chenlong Yin, Ying Chen et al.
🤖 FlashRT: Towards Computationally and Memory Efficient Red-Teaming for Prompt Injection and Knowledge Corruption
💉 prompt injection 🤖 agentic AI

Eyon Jang, Damon Falck, Joschka Braun et al.
🤖 Exploration Hacking: Can LLMs Learn to Resist RL Training?
🤖 agentic AI 🧱 safety

Jiawei Yang, Zhengyang Geng, Xuan Ju et al.
🤖 Representation Fréchet Loss for Visual Generation
⚔️ adversarial
🤖 The paper proposes a new approach to optimize Fréchet Distance for visual generation. Practitioners should care because it improves visual quality and can repurpose multi-step generators into strong one-step generators.
2026-04-30
Tao Ge, Baolin Peng, Hao Cheng et al.
🤖 Synthetic Computers at Scale for Long-Horizon Productivity Simulation
🤖 agentic AI
🤖 Synthetic Computers at Scale creates realistic user environments with folder hierarchies and artifacts. Practitioners should care as it enables simulation of long-term productivity scenarios, helping test defenses against insider threats.

Yanting Wang, Chenlong Yin, Ying Chen et al.
🤖 FlashRT: Towards Computationally and Memory Efficient Red-Teaming for Prompt Injection and Knowledge Corruption

Jiawei Yang, Zhengyang Geng, Xuan Ju et al.

Lei Xiong, Kun Luo, Ziyi Xia et al.
🤖 AutoResearchBench: Benchmarking AI Agents on Complex Scientific Literature Discovery

🤖 This paper proposes aligning natural-language and symbolic views to improve logical reasoning in Large Language Models. It helps stop reasoning errors by leveraging both views.

Akash Ghosh, Subhadip Baidya, Sriparna Saha et al.
🐛 When Background Matters: Breaking Medical Vision Language Models by Transferable Attack
⚔️ adversarial
🐛 MedFocusLeak is a black-box attack that adds imperceptible perturbations to non-diagnostic image areas. It tricks medical vision models into incorrect diagnoses, making it a concern for clinicians relying on these models.

Mon, 13 Apr 2026 14:10:27 GMT  •  KDnuggets
🤖 Are AI Agents Your Next Security Nightmare?
🤖 Autonomous AI agents with reasoning capabilities are emerging, integrated with LLMs or RAG systems. This shift increases the cybersecurity threat landscape as AI agents can act independently.
2026-04-15
Han Wang, David Wan, Hyunji Lee et al.
🤖 MERRIN: A Benchmark for Multimodal Evidence Retrieval and Reasoning in Noisy Web Environments
🤖 agentic AI
🤖 MERRIN benchmarks AI agents' ability to retrieve and reason over noisy web data. Practitioners should care as it reveals agents' weaknesses in handling real-world web searches with conflicting information.
2026-04-15
Yuqiao Tan, Minzheng Wang (Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences), Bo Liu et al.
🤖 From $P(y|x)$ to $P(y)$: Investigating Reinforcement Learning in Pre-train Space
🧱 safety
🤖 This paper proposes optimizing the marginal distribution P(y) in pre-train space using reinforcement learning. It enables better reasoning in large language models by addressing the limitations of conditional distribution optimization.
2026-04-15
Emanuel Gafton (Nordic Optical Telescope, La Palma, Spain, Isaac Newton Group of Telescopes, La Palma, Spain), Illa R. Losada (Nordic Optical Telescope, La Palma, Spain)
🔭 Visplot: A visibility plot and observation scheduling tool for astronomical observatories
📋 NIST taxonomy
🔭 Visplot is a web tool for scheduling astronomical observations, considering telescope limits and celestial parameters. It helps practitioners optimize observation schedules, reducing downtime and increasing productivity.
2026-04-13
Ningyan Zhu, Huacan Wang, Jie Zhou et al.
🤖 SemaClaw: A Step Towards General-Purpose Personal AI Agents through Harness Engineering
🤖 agentic AI 🧱 safety
🤖 SemaClaw is an open-source framework for building controllable AI agents. It helps practitioners create trustworthy AI systems that can collaborate with humans.
2026-04-13
Xiaomeng Hu, Yinger Zhang, Fei Huang et al.
🤖 OccuBench: Evaluating AI Agents on Real-World Professional Tasks via Language World Models
🧱 safety
🤖 OccuBench evaluates AI agents on real-world tasks using language models. It helps practitioners assess AI reliability in professional domains like triage and nuclear safety.

Mon, 13 Apr 2026 14:10:27 GMT  •  KDnuggets
🤖 Are AI Agents Your Next Security Nightmare?
🤖 AI agents with reasoning capabilities are emerging, integrated with large language models. This shift increases cybersecurity risks as agents can act independently, posing new threats to defenders.

Deyuan Liu, Peng Sun, Yansen Han et al.
🤖 Self-Adversarial One Step Generation via Condition Shifting
⚔️ adversarial
🤖 APEX uses a flow model to extract adversarial correction signals, improving one-step text-to-image synthesis. It stops training instability and enables faster, more efficient image generation.
2026-04-14
Yaxuan Li, Yuxin Zuo, Bingxiang He et al.
🤖 Rethinking On-Policy Distillation of Large Language Models: Phenomenology, Mechanism, and Recipe
🧱 safety
🤖 This paper investigates on-policy distillation of large language models, identifying conditions for its success. It helps practitioners improve language model training by revealing what makes distillation effective.
2026-04-14
Erfan Baghaei Potraghloo, Seyedarmin Azizi (University of Southern California;Sharif University of Technology), Souvik Kundu et al.
🤖 One Token Away from Collapse: The Fragility of Instruction-Tuned Helpfulness
📋 NIST taxonomy
🤖 The paper demonstrates that instruction-tuned large language models collapse when faced with simple lexical constraints. This matters because it reveals a fragility that can be exploited to make models produce incomplete or unhelpful responses.

💰 Fed nominee Kevin Warsh's assets exceed $100m. His wealth may lead to a challenging vetting process for legislators.

Virginia joins a national effort to ensure only popular vote winners become president
🏛️ Virginia joins National Popular Vote Compact with 18 states and DC, totaling 222 electoral votes. This brings the US closer to potentially electing presidents by popular vote, changing the electoral landscape.

New Eric Swalwell accuser Lonna Drewes says 'he raped me,' plans to file police report
⚖️ Lonna Drewes accused Rep. Eric Swalwell of rape in 2018. This new allegation may impact Swalwell's political career.
§
🎬 YouTube
2026-04-14  •  AI Daily Brief
▶️ The New AI Org Chart
🎬 Jack Dorsey and Roelof Botha argue AI can replace hierarchy. Their "company as intelligence" vision is compared to Every's emerging shadow org chart.
2026-04-14  •  Morning Brew Daily
▶️ Mark Zuckerberg makes AI clone of himself so he can skip meetings
🎬 Over 1,000 Hollywood creators, including A-listers, oppose the $111 billion Paramount-Warner merger. The merger would reduce major US film studios to just four, potentially leading to fewer movie releases and job losses.

▶️ Bittensor’s (alleged) $10M rug pull (feat. Mark Jeffrey) | E2275

2026-04-14  •  Theo - t3.gg
▶️ Anthropic thinks they're Apple. They're actually hypocrites.
🎬 New episode from Theo - t3.gg. Click to watch.
§
🛡️ AI Security
This week's focus: agentic ai security and adversarial attacks.
Wed, 08 Apr 2026 11:03:25 GMT  •  csoonline.com
🤖 LLM-generated passwords are indefensible. Your codebase may already prove it
🤖 LLM-generated passwords are predictable, with Irregular and Kaspersky research showing they follow patterns. This makes them easy to guess, despite looking complex.
Tue, 14 Apr 2026 18:22:39 GMT  •  The GitHub Blog
🤖 Hack the AI agent: Build agentic AI security skills with the GitHub Secure Code Game
🤖 GitHub's Secure Code Game teaches AI security skills through 5 challenges, used by 10,000+ developers. Defenders can build skills to find and exploit AI vulnerabilities.
Mon, 13 Apr 2026 14:10:27 GMT  •  KDnuggets
🤖 Are AI Agents Your Next Security Nightmare?
🤖 AI agents with reasoning capabilities, integrated with LLMs or RAG, can act independently, posing new security risks. This means defenders must consider autonomous AI threats, not just human attackers.
Fri, 10 Apr 2026 19:57:52 GMT  •  citybuzz -
🤖 VectorCertain’s MYTHOS Program: A Game-Changer in AI Security Standards
🤖 VectorCertain's MYTHOS program demonstrated 100% detection and prevention across 7,000 adversarial scenarios. This means AI security standards now have a high bar for detection and prevention rates.
2026-04-13
Adam Stein, Davis Brown, Hamed Hassani (University of Pennsylvania) et al.
🤖 Detecting Safety Violations Across Many Agent Traces
💉 prompt injection 🤖 agentic AI 🧪 behavioral eval ⚔️ adversarial 🧱 safety
🤖 Meerkat combines clustering and search to detect safety violations in agent traces. It helps stop hidden failures in AI systems, such as reward hacking and prompt injection.
2026-04-13
Wei Zhao, Zhe Li, Peixin Zhang et al.
🔒 ClawGuard: A Runtime Security Framework for Tool-Augmented LLM Agents Against Indirect Prompt Injection
💉 prompt injection 🤖 agentic AI ⚔️ adversarial 🧱 safety 📋 NIST taxonomy
🔒 ClawGuard proposes a runtime security framework to prevent indirect prompt injection in LLM agents. It stops attacks that embed malicious instructions in tool-returned content.
2026-04-13
Hanqi Xiao, Vaidehi Patil, Zaid Khan et al.
🤖 Playing Along: Learning a Double-Agent Defender for Belief Steering via Theory of Mind
🔒 privacy ⚔️ adversarial
🤖 This paper proposes a "double-agent" defender that tricks attackers into thinking they've extracted sensitive info. It stops attackers from extracting info by fooling them into false beliefs.
2026-04-13
Shanchuan Lin, Ceyuan Yang, Zhijie Lin et al.
🤖 Continuous Adversarial Flow Models
⚔️ adversarial
🤖 This paper proposes continuous adversarial flow models that use a learned discriminator to guide training. It improves image and text-to-image generation quality, reducing errors in generated samples.
2026-04-11
Duy Le Dinh Anh, Patrick Amadeus Irawan (MBZUAI), Tuan Van Vo
🤖 Counting to Four is still a Chore for VLMs
⚔️ adversarial 📋 NIST taxonomy
🤖 This paper studies why vision-language models fail at simple tasks like object counting. It helps practitioners identify and fix counting vulnerabilities in these models.
📨 Subscribe via RSS

🛡️ AI Security
This week's focus: agentic ai security and ai alignment & safety.
Wed, 08 Apr 2026 11:03:25 GMT  •  csoonline.com
🤖 LLM-generated passwords are indefensible. Your codebase may already prove it
🤖 LLM-generated passwords are predictable, with 50 attempts yielding only 30 distinct strings, according to Irregular and Kaspersky research. This means defenders should not rely on AI-generated passwords for security.
Thu, 09 Apr 2026 16:03:17 GMT  •  Security Boulevard
🤖 LangChain, Langflow, LiteLLM: When AI’s Foundation Code Becomes the Attack Surface

Hadas Orgad, Boyi Wei (Princeton University), Kaden Zheng et al.
🤖 Large Language Models Generate Harmful Content Using a Distinct, Unified Mechanism
🔓 jailbreak 🧱 safety 🚧 guardrail
🤖 Researchers find that large language models generate harmful content using a distinct, compact set of weights. This knowledge helps practitioners understand how alignment training can be improved to prevent harmful content generation.

Wending Yan, Rongkai Zhang, Kaihua Tang et al.
🤖 RIRF: Reasoning Image Restoration Framework
🤖 agentic AI
🤖 RIRF proposes a framework that integrates reasoning into image restoration. Practitioners should care as it improves restoration quality by diagnosing degradation types and severity.
2026-04-10
Anthony T. Nixon
🤖 Semantic Rate-Distortion for Bounded Multi-Agent Communication: Capacity-Derived Semantic Spaces and the Communication Cost of Alignment
🧱 safety
🤖 Agents with different capacities can induce different semantic spaces, enabling more efficient communication. This helps prevent misalignment in multi-agent interactions by setting a critical communication rate threshold.

📄 ParseBench benchmarks AI document parsing with 2000 verified pages. It reveals gaps in parsing tables, charts, and formatting, which can lead to incorrect autonomous decisions.

Chuzhan Hao, Wenfeng Feng, Guochao Jiang et al.
📄 Beyond Stochastic Exploration: What Makes Training Data Valuable for Agentic Search
🤖 agentic AI
📄 The paper proposes a framework to improve reinforcement learning for search agents by extracting knowledge from experience. This helps prevent inefficient exploration, making search more stable and effective.
2026-04-09
Zhengyang Sun, Yu Chen, Xin Zhou et al.
📄 When Numbers Speak: Aligning Textual Numerals and Visual Instances in Text-to-Video Diffusion Models
🧱 safety
📄 This paper proposes a framework to improve text-to-video models' ability to generate the correct number of objects specified in a prompt. Practitioners should care because it reduces errors in video synthesis, such as incorrect object counts.
